Operation 'updateSiteConfig' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too vague and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Improved description specifies: (1) what can be updated (Powerwall site configuration parameters), (2) input requirements (SiteConfigUpdate object, partial updates supported), (3) what is returned (SiteConfigResponse with new values and live status), and (4) side effects (immediate effect on Powerwall behavior and monitoring). This enables AI agents to understand the operation's scope, constraints, and consequences.

data.current_description: Update one or more configuration parameters for a site.
data.description_suggestion: Updates one or more configuration parameters for a Powerwall site. Accepts a SiteConfigUpdate object with the parameters to modify (partial updates supported). Returns the updated SiteConfigResponse containing the new configuration values and current live status. Changes take effect immediately and affect Powerwall behavior and monitoring.
